title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Type-System Trace: Declaration Files
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts declaration files increment in a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Author or inspect declaration files that describe real runtime values without implementations or false guarantees.
Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
